full_text: March 15, 2026 View in a web browser Share Good morning! Welcome to Metro's daily football newsletter. Read on for the day's biggest and best stories, latest news, gossip and more about the team you love. Peter Schmeichel makes bold Man Utd prediction after Aston Villa win ➜ Wayne Rooney names the manager Man Utd '100 per cent have to' appoint ➜ 'Should have done better' - Wes Brown criticises Man Utd star after Aston Villa win ➜ Diogo Dalot backs Man Utd star to become 'one of the best players in the world' ➜ Man Utd 3-1 Aston Villa: Bruno Fernandes stars in crucial win over top-four rivals ➜ Jamie Carragher urges Man Utd to snub Michael Carrick for Premier League manager ➜ Man Utd vs Aston Villa: Predicted lineup today and confirmed team news ➜ Arsenal target's agent warns Man City are likely to battle them for £100m star ➜ Another Man Utd exit imminent with 'no doubts' over move for £72m star ➜ Jim Ratcliffe speaks out on 'excellent' Michael Carrick and permanent Man Utd job The way...
